lineStatuses.reason: ELIZABETH LINE: From 23:00 Saturday 18 to 11:00 Sunday 19 July there is no service between Stratford and Whitechapel. Customers should interchange at Liverpool Street National Rail platforms to Elizabeth line platforms A & B.

disruption.description: ELIZABETH LINE: From 23:00 Saturday 18 to 11:00 Sunday 19 July there is no service between Stratford and Whitechapel. Customers should interchange at Liverpool Street National Rail platforms to Elizabeth line platforms A & B.

lineStatuses.reason:
WEAVER LINE: Sunday 19 July, until 1015, no service between Liverpool Street and Cheshunt / Chingford / Enfield Town. Use London Underground or London Buses via any reasonable route. GREATER ANGLIA trains will not call at Hackney Downs.

Rail replacement buses will run as follows: Service L1: Seven Sisters - Bruce Grove - White Hart Lane - Silver Street - Edmonton Green - Bush Hill Park - Enfield Town; Service L2: Seven Sisters - Bruce Grove - White Hart Lane - Silver Street - Edmonton Green - Bush Hill Park - Southbury - Turkey Street - Theobalds Grove - Cheshunt; Service L3: Hackney Downs - Clapton - St. James Street - Walthamstow Central - Wood Street - Highams Park - Chingford. 

First trains: Enfield Town to Liverpool Street 09:57; Liverpool Street to Enfield Town 10:20; First Liverpool Street to Cheshunt 10:12; Cheshunt to Liverpool Street 10:01; Liverpool Street to Chingford 10:02; Chingford to Liverpool Street 10:08

Rail replacement buses will run as follows: Service L1: Seven Sisters - Bruce Grove - White Hart Lane - Silver Street - Edmonton Green - Bush Hill Park - Enfield Town; Service L2: Seven Sisters - Bruce Grove - White Hart Lane - Silver Street - Edmonton Green - Bush Hill Park - Southbury - Turkey Street - Theobalds Grove - Cheshunt; Service L3: Hackney Downs - Clapton - St. James Street - Walthamstow Central - Wood Street - Highams Park - Chingford.

lineStatuses.reason: WINDRUSH LINE: Sunday 19 July, no service between Sydenham and West Croydon. Customers for Penge West and Anerley should use local buses from Crystal Palace. Customers for Norwood Junction and West Croydon should use Southern Railway services between Crystal Palace and East Croydon via Norwood Junction, where tickets will be accepted. Alternatively, customers may use local buses or trams via any reasonable route. Rail replacement buses (Operated by Southern Railway) will run between East Croydon and West Croydon, for onward travel to Sutton and Epsom Downs.

lineStatuses.reason: Windrush Line: No service between Sydenham and West Croydon due to planned engineering work. NO SERVICE between Surrey Quays and Clapham Junction while we deal with a trespasser at Clapham High Street. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.
